meta.description: This layer represents developed raster map of SOC  in Vojvodina by combining Atlas* [1] shp data and literature - average values defined in Soils of Vojvodina [2] *Atlas data represents a set of distribution data from [1] Živković et al. (1972). “Zemljišta Vojvodine (Soils of Vojvodina)”. [2] Nejgebauer, V., Živković, B., Tanasijević, Đ., i Miljković, N. (1971). “Pedološka karta Vojvodine razmera 1:50000”. Institut za poljoprivredna istraživanja, Novi Sad.

This layer represents raster data on BD distribution developed by combining Atlas* [1] shp data and literature. 

[1] Živković et al. (1972). “Zemljišta Vojvodine (Soils of Vojvodina)”.

This layer represents developed raster map of pH distribution in Vojvodina by combinimng Atlas* [1] shp data and literature - and average values defined in Soil of Vojvodina [2].                                                    *Atlas data represents a set of distribution data from [1] Živković et al. (1972). “Zemljišta Vojvodine (Soils of Vojvodina)” [2] Nejgebauer, V., Živković, B., Tanasijević, Đ., i Miljković, N. (1971). “Pedološka karta Vojvodine razmera 1:50000”. Institut za poljoprivredna istraživanja, Novi Sad.

This layer represents derived raster map of clay distribution in Vojvodina from Atlas * [1] shp data.  *Atlas data represents a set of distribution data from  [1] Živković et al. (1972). “Zemljišta Vojvodine (Soils of Vojvodina)”.

This layer represents derived raster map of sand distribution in Vojvodina from Atlas * [1] shp data. *Atlas data represents a set of distribution data from [1] Živković et al. (1972). “Zemljišta Vojvodine (Soils of Vojvodina)”.

This layer represents derived raster map of silt distribution in Vojvodina from Atlas * [1] shp data. *Atlas data represents a set of distribution data from  [1] Živković et al. (1972). “Zemljišta Vojvodine (Soils of Vojvodina)”.

The COPERNICUS Digital Elevation Model (DEM) provides high-resolution elevation data for terrain analysis.  This dataset offers a 10-meter spatial resolution and represents altitude values in meters. It is designed for applications such as hydrological modeling, landscape analysis, and infrastructure planning.

Sinks layer is generated using DEM and Filled DEM and present small depressions and sinks around Vojvodina region.  This dataset offers a 10-meter spatial resolution and represents altitude values in meters. It is designed for applications such as hydrological modeling and landscape analysis.

Layer Water and Wetness provides detailed information about the presence and condition of water and wet surfaces across Europe. This product leverages both Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2 images to enable effective mapping of land cover characteristics such as permanent water bodies, transitional water bodies, and soil wetness. This dataset offers a 10-meter spatial resolution. The product has a wide range of applications, including supporting policy decisions, aiding in climate change research, hydrological modeling, habitat mapping, and urban planning.
